current_future_semantic_trace_state_sour: SemanticTraceStateHead consumes future_hidden and predicted future_trace_coord from teacher-forced/free-rollout Stage2 paths.

safe_feedback_locations.readout_only: safe V1 default; modifies semantic-state readout hidden but does not change autoregressive state_seq update.
safe_feedback_locations.hidden_residual: allowed V1 ablation; recomputes readout from feedback-enhanced future_hidden.
safe_feedback_locations.next_step_rollout_feedback: not implemented in V1; requires separate smoke because it changes autoregressive rollout.

minimal_v1_scheme: SemanticStateFeedbackAdapter with small alpha, readout_only or hidden_residual, default-off CLI flags.
